summary: Audience‑sourced recording of unknown date; listeners find it decent but give mixed impressions and note the volume may be high.
review: The three short reviews offer little detail about the performance, with two giving four stars and one only two. No songs or specific moments are mentioned, though one reviewer jokes that the tape is loud enough to annoy neighbors, suggesting a fairly raw audience capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Mixed star ratings (2, 4, 4) and vague comments give no clear picture of either show or recording quality; a middle‑of‑the‑road rating reflects the limited information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit sound quality comments; one reviewer notes it may be loud enough to disturb neighbors, implying a raw, possibly unbalanced audience capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No details provided about set structure or pacing.
